examples: Hecuba He Cuba's life was one of grief and sorrow.
Hecuba, seeing him so beautiful and knowing him to be her son, wept for joy and forgot all about the prophecy7 that he would ruin Troy.
But I also understand that when I say that Hecuba was the best, the sweetest dog who ever lived, it would never occur to me to expect someone else to feel that way about her.
